name: Excellent, Easy Coleslaw
directions: In small bowl, stir mayonnaise, juice,& vinegar well.
Add sugar,& seasonings, mix until dissolved.
Can add milk if dressing needs to be thinned down.
Cover& store in fridge for 30 minutes, to let flavors mingle and dressing thicken up.
After 1/2 hour, mix cabbage, onion,& carrot, together.
Add dressing and mix well.
Put in fridge for at least 1/2 hour.
Stir well, before serving.

name: Sour Cream Supreme
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
For best taste, chill for a couple of hours before serving.
Serve cold.

name: Tex-Mex Dip
directions: Mix together in a bowl.
Cover and chill in the refrigerator for two hours before serving.

name: Herbed Yogurt Dip
directions: Line a strainer with a paper coffee filter.  Suspend strainer over a bowl.
Spoon yogurt into filter.  Cover and refrigerate at least four hours.  Discard strained liquid (or use in cooking).
Combine yogurt and herbs.  Mix well.  Add salt and pepper to taste ( I like lots!).
Serve with chips or veggies.

name: Curried Shrimp Macaroni Salaad
directions: Cook macaroni until just tender.
Drain & rinse with cold water.
Drain, again, well and put in large bowl.
Mix vinegar, oil, salt, pepper and green pepper together.
Combine with macaroni.
Chill overnight.
Combine Miracle Whip, curry powder and lemon juice.
Chill overnight.
Stir into the macaroni mixture, the chopped eggs, if you opted to use them, as well as shrimp.
Stir in the Miracle Whip mixture until well coated.
Enjoy.
